task_completion.description: Load the DEM file into QGIS
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS application is open and the 'bay_area_dem' layer is visible in the Layers panel.

task_completion.description: Configure the Hillshade tool with correct parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Hillshade tool dialog is open. The 'Azimuth' parameter is set to 315 and 'Altitude' is set to 45. The output file path is set to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/hillshade.tif'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Slope tool with correct parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Slope tool dialog is open. Any option like 'Slope expressed as percent' must be UNCHECKED (to ensure the output is in degrees). The output file path is set to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/slope.tif'.

task_completion.description: Generate the Hillshade and Slope layers
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'hillshade' and 'slope' layers are visible in the QGIS Layers panel, indicating the tools have been executed successfully.

The QGIS main window title bar displays 'terrain_analysis' (indicating the project was saved), or a 'Save Project' dialog is visible showing the file name 'terrain_analysis.qgz' in the '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with QGIS menus, dialogs, and panels.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open where GDAL commands (like gdaldem) are being executed to generate the hillshade or slope files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine QGIS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGIS interface should be clearly visible with its standard toolbars, menus, and panels, not a mock interface or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The DEM file is a synthetic terrain located at /home/ga/GIS_Data/rasters/bay_area_dem.tif. The expected outputs are a Hillshade map (Azimuth 315, Altitude 45) saved to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/hillshade.tif, a Slope map (in degrees) saved to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/slope.tif, and the QGIS project saved as /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/terrain_analysis.qgz.
